label: Gentle Female - Sulafat
instructions: Warm, gentle, emotionally present female voice. Speak like intimate character dialogue, not narration. Keep Chinese natural and softly expressive.

label: Soft Female - Achernar
instructions: Soft, tender female voice with restrained emotion. Suitable for shy, caring, vulnerable, or late-night intimate scenes.

label: Gentle Female - Vindemiatrix
instructions: Gentle, calm female voice with a healing feeling. Keep pacing relaxed and emotionally nuanced.

label: Bright Female - Zephyr
instructions: Bright, friendly female voice. Add light smiles and natural enthusiasm without becoming childish.

label: Bright Female - Autonoe
instructions: Clear, bright female voice with playful confidence. Good for lively, flirty, or upbeat characters.

label: Breezy Female - Aoede
instructions: Light, breezy female voice. Keep it casual, charming, and emotionally responsive.

label: Easy-going Female - Callirrhoe
instructions: Relaxed, easy-going female voice. Sound natural, conversational, and close to the listener.

label: Smooth Female - Despina
instructions: Smooth, elegant female voice. Suitable for refined, romantic, confident, or polished characters.

label: Clear Female - Erinome
instructions: Clear, sincere female voice. Keep pronunciation clean and emotion honest, without overacting.

label: Upbeat Female - Laomedeia
instructions: Upbeat female voice with lively emotional color. Good for energetic, teasing, or adventurous characters.

label: Mature Female - Gacrux
instructions: Mature, composed female voice. Keep delivery grounded, slow enough to feel confident, and emotionally controlled.

label: Forward Female - Pulcherrima
instructions: Forward, confident female voice. Good for decisive, stylish, bold, or teasing characters.

label: Firm Female - Kore
instructions: Firm, cool female voice. Keep emotion controlled but present; suitable for sharp, professional, or queenly characters.

label: Youthful Female - Leda
instructions: Youthful, light female voice for adult characters with a fresh tone. Avoid sounding childlike.

label: Calm Male - Charon
instructions: Calm, steady male voice. Speak conversationally with quiet confidence, not like a lecture.

label: Upbeat Male - Puck
instructions: Upbeat, friendly male voice. Suitable for playful, charming, or energetic adult characters.

label: Excitable Male - Fenrir
instructions: Excitable, intense male voice with strong emotional lift. Avoid shouting unless the scene clearly calls for it.

label: Firm Male - Orus
instructions: Firm, authoritative male voice. Good for protective, serious, disciplined, or leader characters.

label: Breathy Male - Enceladus
instructions: Breathy, softer male voice. Use close, restrained delivery for intimate or emotionally vulnerable scenes.

label: Clear Male - Iapetus
instructions: Clear, sincere male voice. Keep articulation clean and emotion natural.

label: Easy-going Male - Umbriel
instructions: Relaxed, easy-going male voice. Keep it casual, warm, and conversational.

label: Smooth Male - Algieba
instructions: Smooth, polished male voice. Suitable for romantic, refined, charismatic, or elegant characters.

label: Gravelly Male - Algenib
instructions: Gravelly, rougher male voice. Good for brooding, noir, warrior, or dangerous characters.

label: Informative Male - Rasalgethi
instructions: Measured, thoughtful male voice. Keep it warm enough for roleplay and avoid a flat explainer tone.

label: Firm Male - Alnilam
instructions: Firm, serious male voice with controlled intensity. Good for high-status or disciplined characters.

label: Even Male - Schedar
instructions: Even, stable male voice. Good as a neutral baseline for calm adult male characters.

label: Friendly Male - Achird
instructions: Friendly, approachable male voice. Add warmth and small smiles where appropriate.

label: Casual Male - Zubenelgenubi
instructions: Casual, modern male voice. Keep delivery natural, not theatrical.

label: Lively Male - Sadachbia
instructions: Lively, expressive male voice. Suitable for witty, fast, sociable, or teasing characters.

label: Knowledgeable Male - Sadaltager
instructions: Knowledgeable, steady male voice. Good for mentor, strategist, professor, or wise adult characters.

label: Neutral Even - Sage
instructions: Neutral, balanced voice. Keep gender presentation subtle and delivery emotionally responsive.
